title: tragacantha robusta
intro: Tragacantha robusta, also known as Astragalus robustus, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae, native to the western United States and Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of Tragacantha robusta include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and enhancing overall immune function. Herbal preparations of Tragacantha robusta include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
